metadata.name: OEM Library
metadata.description: Metadata-level registry of OEM identities recognised by TorqPro (Faz 2.4.1 scope). No OEM-specific technical rule is asserted.

records.notes: Metadata-level OEM registry entry (Faz 2.4.1 scope); does NOT carry an OEM-specific torque/technical rule. See backend.standards for norm-level content where available.
records.source: TorqPro OEM catalog (identity only, no technical content)
